compiled_state.title: Delete test-locked orphan: comment_binding.py + test_comment_binding.py
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Zero importers in src/ — live comment-identity machinery is binding_store.py (imported by applier/differs/reconcile/__main__). Docstring cites docs/contracts/comment-binding-schema.md '(relative to plugin root)' which does not exist here. Delete module and its locking test together.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Module + tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/test_comment_binding.py deleted in one commit
- [ ] Full suite green
